Home / AI Assistant / Tencent Marvis

Tencent Marvis

AI Assistant by 腾讯
★★★★ ★ 4

Operating system-level AI assistant by Tencent's App Store team. Fully launched May 21. 10M free tokens daily, powered by DeepSeek V4 and Hunyuan models. Windows, Mac, Android. Privacy mode (local model, zero upload) and efficiency mode (cloud-edge). 8 built-in agents for file search, system settings, remote control, document processing.

Visit Website Paid from: Completely free

🆓 Free Tier Details

Free Credits

1000

Resets daily

Credit Card

✅ Not Required

Watermark

✅ No watermark

Commercial Use

❌ Not allowed

Last verified: 2026-05-21

👍👎 Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • + Completely free, 10M tokens daily
  • + OS-level agent, truly controls PC
  • + Privacy mode, zero file upload
  • + Phone remote control of PC
  • + 8 built-in agents, ready to use
  • + DeepSeek V4 + Hunyuan dual models

❌ Cons

  • - Requires 16GB RAM minimum
  • - Mac needs M1 or newer
  • - iOS not yet available (mid-June)
  • - Tencent ecosystem lock-in risk

🎯 Key Features

OS-level AI Agent Local file smart search One-sentence PC settings Phone remote control PC Deep file understanding Privacy mode (local model) 8 built-in specialized agents Windows/Mac/Android

💡 Tips & Tricks

  • 1 Choose mode on setup: Privacy for sensitive files, Efficiency for speed
  • 2 Install Marvis on phone + scan QR to pair, enables remote PC control
  • 3 10M tokens = ~5000 conversations, more than enough for daily use
  • 4 Test privacy mode with non-sensitive files first before processing important docs
📅 Last verified: 2026-05-21
🚩 Report Outdated Info

Tabbit

⭐ 4
AI Assistant

An AI browser built from the ground up by Meituan's Light Years team — not a Chrome extension with a sidebar, but AI woven into every layer. Chat with AI while browsing, referencing pages, screenshots, or local files. Built-in Agent automates repetitive tasks like form filling and data collection. Create custom Skills for your workflows. Standard version is free forever with ~1000 AI chats/week, 50 images, and 10 Agent tasks.
